name: criminal_justice_sensor_fusion_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A plea deadline expires at noon; newly surfaced body-worn video may exculpate but discovery rules are disputed. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice sensor fusion stonehaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Fatima Berg
agents.identity: I am Fatima Berg, the accountable executive on this bridge in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Hughes
agents.identity: I am Keisha Hughes, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Fatima Berg must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Fatima Berg do?
